_readme: Optional student profiles for the archive dossier. Key each entry by the student SLUG (name lower-cased, accents stripped, spaces -> hyphens: 'Zoya' -> 'zoya', 'Zoë O'Brien' -> 'zo-o-brien'). Every field is optional; anything left blank falls back to a placeholder. photo = a repo path (uploads/portraits/<slug>.jpg) or any image URL. links = instagram / linkedin / behance / website / email (email may be a bare address). This is sandbox demo content.

aarav.bio: Works between drawing and model, testing how a threshold can hold both a pause and a crowd. Interested in the quiet infrastructure of everyday movement.

diya.bio: Collects thresholds — benches, steps, ledges — and asks what each one asks of the body. Field notes and slow section drawings.

kabir.bio: Long-caption thinker. Builds arguments the size of a paragraph and then tries to draw them in one line.

meera.bio: Sound and section. Records the room before she draws it, so the plan remembers how it felt to stand there.

saanvi.bio: Maps the in-between: the twenty metres nobody designs. Interested in edges, verges and the accidental public.

vikram.bio: Structure as narrative. Likes a drawing that admits how it was made.

ananya.bio: Between reference and reverie — builds a reading list into every project and lets it wander.

tara.bio: Time-based drawing — the same corner, redrawn every week, until the change becomes the subject.

neel.bio: Model-maker. Believes the fastest way to understand a space is to build it badly, twice.

priya.bio: Writes the brief she wishes she'd been given, then answers it. Interested in care as a design constraint.
